output.summary: Uses score-first TTT with 30 epochs at LR≈1 and fully unfrozen blocks to extract extra gain after base training.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT adapts all weights via SGD directly on the validation shard, so optimization happens on val data.
techniques: Score-first TTT SGD on validation data with aggressive LR/epochs
Unfreezing every block to stabilize high-LR adaptation
Int6 per-row quant plus sliding-window eval within budget
